notes.recent_policy: User prefers recent_h=24; attached report's 48h is treated as an alternative hyperparameter, not the default.
notes.lab_policy: Labs are represented as latest-lab memory for hour head and daily lab blocks for day head; exact draw times are unavailable in this CSV, so update flags are proxies from value changes/first non-missing values.
notes.leakage_policy: Sepsis/infectionDay/infectionHour are label-only. First-48h summaries are gated; APACHE is audit-only by default.
notes.surgery_semantics: surgSum=Days in Surgery; surgHours=Hours in Surgery, per user-provided fields.png/G3 screenshot.
